understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to get pushable objects (blocks) onto goal tiles marked with '+' in the semantic grid. Each level required satisfying the win condition by positioning blocks correctly on the designated goal positions.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used pixel coordinates [x, y] on a 3-pixel-per-cell grid. The player could select different pieces via CLICK to switch control between them. Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempted to shift the selected piece, and pushable blocks would move along with the player if adjacent in the movement direction. Walls blocked movement in various ways and required interaction to understand their specific behavior. The semantic_grid showed the current state with P=selected piece, S=other selectables, B=blocks, #=walls, +=goals, and .=empty cells. The game had a step budget per level that decreased with each action.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to get pushable objects (blocks) onto goal tiles marked with '+' in the semantic grid. Each level required satisfying the win condition by positioning blocks correctly on the designated goal positions.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement used pixel coordinates [x, y] on a 3-pixel-per-cell grid. The player could select different pieces via CLICK to switch control between them. Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempted to shift the selected piece, and pushable blocks would move along with the player if adjacent in the movement direction. Walls blocked movement in various ways and required interaction to understand their specific behavior. The semantic_grid showed the current state with P=selected piece, S=other selectables, B=blocks, #=walls, +=goals, and .=empty cells. The game had a step budget per level that decreased with each action.
